title: Diplodoc (.yfm)

input.description: Path to input directory with documentation sources.
input.markdownDescription: **`string`** Path to the directory containing documentation sources (`.md` files, `toc.yaml`, `presets.yaml`, etc.).

output.description: Path to output directory for build artifacts.
output.markdownDescription: **`string`** Path to the directory where build artifacts are written.

quiet.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Suppress all stdout log output during the build.

strict.description: Exit with non-zero code on errors or warnings.
strict.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Exit with a non-zero code if any errors **or warnings** are emitted during the build.

jobs.description: Number of parallel worker threads. 0 means single-threaded, omitted value uses cpus-1.
jobs.markdownDescription:
**`integer (≥0)`** Number of parallel worker threads.

- `0` — single-threaded (no workers)
- omitted — uses `CPU count − 1`

workerMaxOldSpace.description: Max old space size for worker threads in megabytes.
workerMaxOldSpace.markdownDescription: **`integer`** Maximum V8 old-space heap size (in **megabytes**) for each worker thread.

config.description: Path to an alternative config file.
config.markdownDescription: **`string`** Path to an alternative config file. Useful for environment-specific overrides.

copyOnWrite.description: Use COPYFILE_FICLONE flag for file copying.
copyOnWrite.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Use `COPYFILE_FICLONE` (copy-on-write / reflinks) when copying files. Faster on supported filesystems (APFS, Btrfs).

originAsInput.description: Allow modifying the input directory in-place.
originAsInput.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Allow the build to modify the `input` directory in-place (used in `md` output mode).

lang.markdownDescription: **`string`** Default language code for the documentation (ISO 639-1, e.g. `en`, `ru`).

langs.description: Languages supported by the documentation project. Each item is a language code string or an extended object.
langs.markdownDescription:
**`LangItem[]`** All languages supported by the project. Used to generate language-switcher links.

Each item is a language code string or an extended object:
```yaml
langs:
  - en
  - ru
  - lang: zh
    tld: .cn
```

outputFormat.description: Output format. html — render to static HTML. md — render to enriched Markdown with metadata.
markdownEnumDescriptions: **html** — render to a fully static HTML site (default).
**md** — render to enriched Markdown with injected metadata (for further processing or translation).

varsPreset.description: Name of the variables preset from presets.yaml. Merged with the "default" section.
varsPreset.markdownDescription:
**`string`** Name of a preset from `presets.yaml` to activate.

The named preset is deep-merged with the `default` preset.

vars.description: Template variables passed directly to the build. Overrides matching keys from presets.yaml.
vars.markdownDescription:
**`object`** Template variables passed directly to the build. Overrides matching keys from `presets.yaml`.

```yaml
vars:
  version: '2.0'
  env: production
```

allowHTML.description: Allow raw HTML inside Markdown files (legacy alias for allowHtml).
allowHTML.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** *(legacy alias)* Allow raw HTML inside Markdown files. Prefer `allowHtml`.

allowHtml.description: Allow raw HTML inside Markdown files.
allowHtml.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Allow raw HTML tags inside Markdown files. When `false` (default), HTML tags are escaped.

sanitizeHtml.description: Sanitize transformed HTML output. Slow but more secure.
sanitizeHtml.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Run the generated HTML through an HTML sanitizer. Slower but removes potentially dangerous markup.

sanitizeOptions.description: Sanitizer configuration options (passed to the HTML sanitizer).
sanitizeOptions.markdownDescription: **`object`** Options passed to the HTML sanitizer (when `sanitizeHtml: true`). See the sanitizer's documentation for available keys.

linkifyTlds.description: TLD configuration for the linkify plugin.
linkifyTlds.markdownDescription:
**`string | string[]`** Additional TLDs recognized by the linkify plugin as auto-link candidates.

Example: `['.internal', '.corp']`

ignore.description: Glob patterns for paths to exclude from processing.
ignore.markdownDescription:
**`string[]`** Glob patterns for files/directories to exclude from processing.

```yaml
ignore:
  - '**/draft/**'
  - '**/*.tmp.md'
```

markdownEnumDescriptions: Exclude pages tagged `skip` (already excluded by default).

ignoreStage.description: TOC stages to exclude from the build.
ignoreStage.markdownDescription:
**`string[]`** TOC `stage` values to exclude from the build.

Example: `['new', 'preview']` — only ship stable pages.

staticContent.description: Allow loading custom resources into statically generated pages.
staticContent.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Allow custom resources (`script`, `style`) to be injected in static output mode.

addSystemMeta.description: Include system variables from presets in file metadata.
addSystemMeta.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Inject preset variables into each page's `__system` metadata field.

addMapFile.description: Write all documentation paths to file.json.

addAlternateMeta.description: Add alternate and canonical meta tags to pages.
addAlternateMeta.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Emit `<link rel="alternate">` and `<link rel="canonical">` meta tags.

supportGithubAnchors.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Generate GitHub-compatible heading anchors (lowercase, hyphens) in addition to standard anchors.

breaks.description: Treat single newlines in Markdown as hard line breaks.
breaks.markdownDescription:
**`boolean`** Treat single newlines in Markdown as `
` hard line breaks (CommonMark 'breaks' option).

linkify.description: Automatically convert URL-like text to links.
linkify.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Automatically convert plain URL-like text into clickable `<a>` links.

endpoint.description: VCS provider API endpoint (from github-vcs / arcadia-vcs).
endpoint.markdownDescription: **`string`** VCS provider API endpoint (from github-vcs / arcadia-vcs).

initialCommit.description: Initial commit SHA for redirect tracking (from github-vcs / arcadia-vcs).
initialCommit.markdownDescription: **`string`** Initial commit SHA for redirect tracking (from github-vcs / arcadia-vcs).

vcs.description: Enable or disable the VCS connector. Object form accepts extension-specific fields.
vcs.markdownDescription:
**`boolean | object`** Version control system connector.

- `false` — disable VCS integration
- `true` — enable with defaults
- Object — explicit settings:
  - `enabled` **`boolean`**
  - `endpoint` **`string`** — API endpoint URL
  - `owner` **`string`** — repository owner (GitHub)
  - `repo` **`string`** — repository name (GitHub)
  - `branch` **`string`** — default branch
  - `initialCommit` **`string`** — SHA for redirect tracking
  - `scopes` **`string[]`** — VCS scopes (Arcadia)

vcsToken.description: VCS access token. WARNING: Do not store secrets in the config file. Use environment variables or CLI arguments instead.
vcsToken.markdownDescription:
**`string`** ⚠️ VCS access token.

> **WARNING:** Do not store secrets in the config file. Use environment variables or CLI `--vcs-token` argument instead.

vcsPath.description: Show the VCS file path in the page header.
vcsPath.markdownDescription: **`boolean | {enabled: boolean}`** Show the VCS file path ("Edit on GitHub" link) in the page header.

mtimes.description: Collect file modification timestamps from VCS.
mtimes.markdownDescription: **`boolean | {enabled: boolean}`** Collect file modification timestamps from VCS for the "Last updated" footer.

authors.markdownDescription: **`boolean | object`** Collect per-file author information from VCS commit history.

contributors.markdownDescription: **`boolean | object`** Collect per-file contributor list from VCS commit history.

template.markdownDescription:
**`boolean | TemplateConfig`** Configure the Liquid template engine.

- `false` — disable templating entirely
- Object — fine-grained control over features and scopes

lint.markdownDescription:
**`boolean | LintConfig`** Configure YFM linting during the build.

- `false` — disable linting
- Object — enable with custom config path or inline rules

extensions.description: External extensions loaded on startup. Each item is a package name or an object with name and options.
extensions.markdownDescription:
**`ExtensionItem[]`** External extensions loaded at build startup.

Each item is an npm package name or an object with `name` and options:
```yaml
extensions:
  - '@diplodoc/openapi-extension'
  - name: my-extension
    option: value
```

toc.description: Show the table of contents sidebar.
toc.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Show (`true`) or hide (`false`) the table-of-contents sidebar globally.

toc-header.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Show (`true`) or hide (`false`) the TOC header section globally.

search.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Show (`true`) or hide (`false`) the search input globally.

feedback.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Show (`true`) or hide (`false`) the like/dislike feedback widget globally.

favicon-src.markdownDescription: **`string`** Default favicon URL for all pages.

interface.markdownDescription:
**`{toc, toc-header, search, ...}`** Global UI visibility flags. Per-page `interface` frontmatter overrides these values.

Available fields:
- `toc` — show/hide the sidebar
- `toc-header` — show/hide the TOC header section
- `search` — show/hide the search input
- `feedback` — show/hide like/dislike controls
- `favicon-src` — custom favicon URL

feedbackUrl.markdownDescription: **`string (uri)`** URL endpoint that receives feedback submissions (POST). Used by the feedback widget.

resources.description: Custom scripts, styles, and CSP directives.
resources.markdownDescription:
**`Resources`** Custom scripts, stylesheets, and CSP directives injected into every page.

```yaml
resources:
  style:
    - _assets/custom.css
  script:
    - _assets/custom.js
```

allowCustomResources.description: Allow loading custom resources in static output mode.
allowCustomResources.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Allow the `resources` field to inject scripts/styles in static output mode.

disableCsp.description: Do not inject Content-Security-Policy meta tags into generated HTML pages. Use when CSP is managed externally (e.g. via server HTTP headers).
disableCsp.markdownDescription:
**`boolean`** Do **not** inject `Content-Security-Policy` `<meta>` tags into the HTML output.

Use this when CSP is managed via HTTP headers on the server.

theme.description: Override the base brand color or disable theming. null disables theme.yaml processing.
theme.markdownDescription:
**`string | null`** Path to a `theme.yaml` file that overrides brand colors.

- `null` — disable theme processing entirely

search.markdownDescription:
**`boolean | SearchConfig`** Documentation search feature.

- `false` — disable search
- Object — configure provider (local or algolia)

singlePage.description: Produce a single-page HTML variant for each TOC.
singlePage.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Generate a single-page HTML variant for each TOC that concatenates all pages.

hiddenPolicy.description: Exclude hidden TOC items from PDF output.
hiddenPolicy.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Exclude hidden TOC items from PDF output.

icon.description: Custom icon for the PDF download button. Accepted values: inline SVG markup, absolute URL, or a project-relative path starting with _assets/. For md output, paths under _assets/ are copied to the output directory.
icon.markdownDescription: **`string`** Custom icon for the PDF download button. Accepted values: inline SVG markup, absolute URL, or a project-relative path starting with _assets/. For md output, paths under _assets/ are copied to the output directory.

position.description: Where to render the PDF download button. toc — below the table of contents (default). header — in the page header next to other controls.
position.markdownDescription: **`'toc' | 'header'`** Where to render the PDF download button. toc — below the table of contents (default). header — in the page header next to other controls.

size.description: Size of the PDF download button icon.
size.markdownDescription: **`'S' | 'M' | 'L'`** Size of the PDF download button icon.

pdfFileUrl.description: URL or path to the generated PDF file. Used only in static HTML builds (outputFormat: html) where the PDF download link cannot be resolved automatically. In the web viewer this value is computed on the server side.
pdfFileUrl.markdownDescription: **`string`** URL or path to the generated PDF file. Used only in static HTML builds (outputFormat: html) where the PDF download link cannot be resolved automatically. In the web viewer this value is computed on the server side.

pdf.markdownDescription:
**`boolean | object`** PDF output generation.

- `false` — disable
- `true` — enable with defaults
- Object — enable with `hiddenPolicy`

pdfDebug.description: Include PDF start pages in the output for debugging.
pdfDebug.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Include PDF start/end pages in the HTML output for debugging page breaks.

hashIncludes.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Replace included file paths with content hashes.

mergeIncludes.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Inline `{% include %}` directives — merge the included content into the parent file.

disableMetaMaxLineWidth.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Disable the maximum line-width limit on metadata output.

preprocess.description: Fine-tune Markdown preprocessing for md output format.
preprocess.markdownDescription: **`{hashIncludes, mergeIncludes, mergeAutotitles, ...}`** Markdown preprocessing flags for `md` output format only. - `hashIncludes` **`boolean`** — replace include paths with content hashes - `mergeIncludes` **`boolean`** — inline `{% include %}` directives - `mergeAutotitles` **`boolean`** — merge auto-generated heading anchors - `mergeSvg` **`boolean`** — inline SVG `` as `

mergeIncludes.description: Merge include contents into parent files (shorthand).

maxInlineSvgSize.description: Maximum size for inline SVG embedding.
maxInlineSvgSize.markdownDescription: **`string | integer`** Maximum SVG file size for inline embedding. Format: `'100K'`, `'2M'`, or bytes as integer. Larger files are kept as `` references.

maxHtmlSize.markdownDescription: **`string | integer`** Maximum rendered HTML file size. Build warns if a page exceeds this limit.

maxAssetSize.description: Maximum asset file size. 0 disables the check.
maxAssetSize.markdownDescription: **`string | integer`** Maximum single asset file size. `0` disables the check.

multilineTermDefinitions.description: Allow term definitions to span multiple lines. When enabled, a definition continues until the next [*key]: or end of block. Default: false.
multilineTermDefinitions.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Allow term definitions (`[*key]: ...`) to span multiple lines. Default: `false`.

content.markdownDescription:
**`{maxInlineSvgSize, maxHtmlSize, maxAssetSize, multilineTermDefinitions}`** Content size limits and processing options.

- `maxInlineSvgSize` **`string | integer`** — max SVG size for inline embedding
- `maxHtmlSize` **`string | integer`** — max rendered HTML page size
- `maxAssetSize` **`string | integer`** — max asset file size (`0` = no limit)
- `multilineTermDefinitions` **`boolean`** — allow multi-line term definitions

removeHiddenTocItems.description: Strip hidden items from the table of contents.
removeHiddenTocItems.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Strip `hidden: true` items from the compiled TOC JSON.

removeEmptyTocItems.description: Strip empty items from the table of contents.
removeEmptyTocItems.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Strip TOC sections that have no visible child pages after filtering.

buildManifest.description: Emit yfm-build-manifest.json with all documentation paths.
buildManifest.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Emit `yfm-build-manifest.json` listing all built page paths.

crawlerManifest.description: Emit crawler-manifest.json mapping each source file to its external links. Useful for link-health checks (detecting 404, 403, etc.).
crawlerManifest.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Emit `crawler-manifest.json` mapping each source file to its external links. Useful for link-health checks (404/403 detection).

changelogs.description: Enable changelog generation. String value selects the format.
changelogs.markdownDescription: **`boolean | string`** Enable changelog generation. String value selects the output format.

watch.description: Enable file-watching mode with incremental rebuilds.
watch.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable file-watching mode with incremental rebuilds on change.

skipHtmlExtension.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Remove `.html` extension from all generated internal links.

analytics.markdownDescription:
**`AnalyticsConfig`** Web analytics configuration.

- `gtm` **`AnalyticsConfig`** — Google Tag Manager (`id: string`, `mode: 'base' | 'notification'`)

gtm.markdownDescription:
**`object`** Google Tag Manager settings.

- `id` **`string`** — GTM container ID (e.g. `GTM-XXXXXX`)
- `mode` **`'base' | 'notification'`** — consent mode

markdownEnumDescriptions: Notification consent mode — additional consent signals.

neuroExpert.markdownDescription:
**`NeuroExpertConfig`** AI expert widget global configuration.

- `projectId` **`NeuroExpertConfig`** — language → project ID map
- `hasOutsideClick` **`boolean`** — close on outside click
- `parentId` **`string | null`** — parent element ID
- `disabled` **`boolean`** — disable widget globally
- `customLabel` **`NeuroExpertConfig`** — language → custom header label map
- `type` **`'widget' | 'search'`** — widget integration type

yabug.markdownDescription:
**`YaBugConfig`** Bug-report widget (docs-viewer) global configuration.

- `disabled` **`boolean`** — disable widget globally
- `form` **`string`** — custom bug-report form URL or path

yafeedback.markdownDescription:
**`YaFeedbackConfig`** Yandex Feedback (Pythia) widget global configuration.

- `ownerId` **`string | object`** — feedback owner ID or per-language map
- `hideHeader` **`boolean`** — hide widget header
- `disabled` **`boolean`** — disable widget globally
- `testIds` **`YaFeedbackConfig`** — A/B test form IDs

docs-viewer.description: Configuration for the docs-viewer preview server.
docs-viewer.markdownDescription:
**`DocsViewerConfig`** Configuration for the docs-viewer preview server.

Key fields: `project-name`, `lang`, `langs`, `favicon-src`, `logo-options`, `metrika`, `gtm`, `themes`.

accessDenied.markdownDescription: **`object`** Custom 403 access-denied page settings (passed to the viewer's page renderer).

notFound.markdownDescription: **`object`** Custom 404 not-found page settings (passed to the viewer's page renderer).

serverError.markdownDescription: **`object`** Custom 500 server-error page settings (passed to the viewer's page renderer).

pages.markdownDescription:
**`{accessDenied, notFound, serverError}`** Custom error and access-denied page configuration.

- `accessDenied` **`{accessDenied, notFound, serverError}`** — custom 403 page settings
- `notFound` **`{accessDenied, notFound, serverError}`** — custom 404 page settings
- `serverError` **`{accessDenied, notFound, serverError}`** — custom 500 page settings

queryParameters.description: Query parameter forwarding rules for embedded iframes.
queryParameters.markdownDescription: **`{iframes}`** Global query parameter forwarding rules for `<iframe>` embeds.

build.description: Scoped overrides for the build command. Accepts the same properties as the root level.
build.markdownDescription: **`object`** Scoped overrides applied only during the `build` command. Accepts the same properties as the root level.

conditionsInCode.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** *(deprecated)* Process Liquid conditions inside code blocks.

LangItem.description: Language code or extended language object.
LangItem.markdownDescription:
**`string | {lang, tld?, href?}`** Language entry.

- Simple: `'en'`
- Extended: `{lang: 'en', tld: '.com', href: '/en/'}`

Toggleable.description: Boolean or object with an enabled flag.
Toggleable.markdownDescription: **`boolean | {enabled: boolean}`** Simple toggle — either `true`/`false` or an object with `enabled: true/false`.

oneOf.description: Size with optional unit suffix: K (kilobytes), M (megabytes).
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`string`** Size with optional unit suffix: K (kilobytes), M (megabytes).

FileSize.description: File size — integer bytes or string with K/M suffix.
FileSize.markdownDescription:
**`string | integer`** File size value.

- String with suffix: `'512K'`, `'10M'`
- Integer: bytes (`1048576` = 1 MB)

ExtensionItem.description: Extension package name or object with name and options.
ExtensionItem.markdownDescription:
**`string | {name, ...}`** Extension item.

- String: npm package name
- Object: `{name: 'package-name', option: value}`

script.description: Paths or URLs to JavaScript files.
script.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Paths or URLs to JavaScript files (relative to `input`).

style.description: Paths or URLs to CSS files.
style.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Paths or URLs to CSS files (relative to `input`).

csp.description: Content Security Policy directive overrides. Each item is an object mapping a directive name to allowed sources.
csp.markdownDescription: **`object[]`** Content Security Policy directive overrides. Each item maps a directive (e.g. `script-src`) to allowed sources.

Resources.markdownDescription: **`Resources`** Custom assets injected into every page.
Resources.description: Custom scripts, stylesheets, and CSP directives.

enabled.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable or disable the template engine.

keepNotVar.description: Keep unresolved variable placeholders instead of removing them.
keepNotVar.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Keep unresolved `{{ variable }}` placeholders as-is instead of removing them.

legacyConditions.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Use legacy Liquid condition syntax (for backwards compatibility).

text.description: Process template expressions in regular text.
text.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Process Liquid expressions in regular text content.

code.description: Process template expressions inside code blocks.
code.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Process Liquid expressions inside code blocks (backtick or fenced).

scopes.markdownDescription:
**`{text, code}`** Where to process Liquid expressions.

- `text` **`boolean`** — process in regular text
- `code` **`boolean`** — process inside code blocks

conditions.description: Enable conditional blocks. 'strict' mode is used by the translate command.
conditions.markdownDescription:
**`boolean | 'strict'`** Enable `{% if %}` conditional blocks.

`'strict'` mode is required by the `translate` command.

cicles.description: Alternative spelling of cycles (used in documentation). Enable loop constructs.
cicles.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Alternative spelling of cycles (used in documentation). Enable loop constructs.

features.markdownDescription:
**`{substitutions, conditions, cycles, cicles}`** Which Liquid features to enable.

- `substitutions` **`boolean`** — `{{ var }}` variable substitution
- `conditions` **`boolean | 'strict'`** — `{% if %}` blocks
- `cycles` **`boolean`** — `{% for %}` loops

TemplateConfig.markdownDescription:
**`TemplateConfig`** Liquid template engine settings.

- `enabled` **`boolean`** — enable/disable
- `keepNotVar` **`boolean`** — keep unresolved `{{ var }}` placeholders
- `scopes` **`{enabled, keepNotVar, legacyConditions, ...}`** — where to process: `text`, `code`
- `features` **`{enabled, keepNotVar, legacyConditions, ...}`** — what to process: `substitutions`, `conditions`, `cycles`
TemplateConfig.description: Liquid template engine config. Fields: enabled, keepNotVar, legacyConditions, scopes (text, code), features (substitutions, conditions, cycles).

enabled.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable or disable linting during the build.

oneOf.description: Path to an external .yfmlint config file.
oneOf.markdownDescription: **`string`** Path to an external .yfmlint config file.

config.markdownDescription:
**`string | object`** Lint configuration.

- String — path to a `.yfmlint` file
- Object — inline rule configuration (same format as `.yfmlint`)

enabled.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable or disable the search feature.

markdownEnumDescriptions: **local** — full-text search index generated at build time. No external service required.
**algolia** — Algolia DocSearch or custom index. Requires `appId`, `apiKey`, `indexName`.

searchApiKey.description: Client-side Algolia API key for search queries (provider=algolia).
searchApiKey.markdownDescription: **`string`** Client-side Algolia API key for search queries (provider=algolia).

index.description: Whether to create and upload the search index (provider=algolia).
index.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Whether to create and upload the search index (provider=algolia).

api.description: Path to the client-side search API script (provider=algolia).
api.markdownDescription: **`string`** Path to the client-side search API script (provider=algolia).

tolerance.description: Wildcard search tolerance level (provider=local). 0 — exact match, 1 — trailing wildcard, 2 — leading and trailing.
tolerance.markdownDescription:
**`0 | 1 | 2`** Wildcard tolerance for local search.

- `0` — exact match only
- `1` — trailing wildcard
- `2` — leading and trailing wildcard

confidence.markdownDescription:
**`'phrased' | 'sparsed'`** Search scoring strategy for local provider.

- `phrased` — prefer exact phrase matches
- `sparsed` — allow sparse word matches

confidense.description: Alternative spelling of confidence. Search scoring strategy (provider=local).
confidense.markdownDescription: **`'phrased' | 'sparsed'`** Alternative spelling of confidence. Search scoring strategy (provider=local).

indexSettings.description: Algolia index settings (provider=algolia). Passed to Algolia setSettings. Supports searchableAttributes, attributesToHighlight, etc.
indexSettings.markdownDescription: **`object`** Algolia index settings passed to `setSettings`. Supports `searchableAttributes`, `attributesToHighlight`, etc.

querySettings.description: Algolia query settings (provider=algolia). Merged into each search request. Supports hitsPerPage, attributesToRetrieve, etc.
querySettings.markdownDescription: **`object`** Algolia query settings merged into each search request. Supports `hitsPerPage`, `attributesToRetrieve`, etc.

SearchConfig.markdownDescription:
**`SearchConfig`** Documentation search configuration.

- `enabled` **`boolean`** — enable/disable search
- `provider` **`'local' | 'algolia'`** — search backend
- `tolerance` **`0 | 1 | 2`** — wildcard tolerance (local only)
- `confidence` **`'phrased' | 'sparsed'`** — scoring strategy (local only)
- `appId` / `apiKey` / `indexName` — Algolia credentials
SearchConfig.description: Search config. Fields: enabled, provider (local|algolia), tolerance (0-2), confidence (phrased|sparsed), and Algolia-specific fields.

projectId.description: Map of language codes to project IDs. Use "default" key for fallback.
projectId.markdownDescription: **`object`** Map of language codes to AI expert project IDs. Use `default` as fallback key.

hasOutsideClick.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Close the AI expert widget when the user clicks outside it.

parentId.markdownDescription: **`string | null`** Parent element ID for widget placement. `null` uses the default placement.

disabled.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Disable the AI expert widget globally.

customLabel.description: Map of language codes to custom widget header labels. Use "default" key for fallback. Only for whitelisted projects.
customLabel.markdownDescription: **`object`** Map of language codes to custom widget header labels. Use `default` as fallback key. Only available for whitelisted projects.

type.description: Widget integration type. default — floating widget initialized on page load. search — widget activated via search suggest button.
type.markdownDescription:
**`'widget' | 'search'`** Widget integration type.

- `widget` — floating widget initialized on page load
- `search` — widget activated via search suggest button

NeuroExpertConfig.markdownDescription:
**`NeuroExpertConfig`** AI expert (Yandex Neuro Expert) widget configuration.

- `projectId` **`{projectId, hasOutsideClick, parentId, ...}`** — language → project ID map (use `default` as fallback key)
- `hasOutsideClick` **`boolean`** — close widget on outside click
- `parentId` **`string | null`** — parent element ID for placement
- `disabled` **`boolean`** — disable the widget globally
- `customLabel` **`{projectId, hasOutsideClick, parentId, ...}`** — language → custom header label map
- `type` **`'widget' | 'search'`** — widget integration type
NeuroExpertConfig.description: AI expert widget config. Fields: projectId, hasOutsideClick, parentId, disabled, customLabel, type.

accessKeyId.description: S3 access key ID. WARNING: Do not store secrets in the config file.
accessKeyId.markdownDescription: **`string`** ⚠️ S3 access key ID. Do not commit secrets — use environment variables.

secretAccessKey.description: S3 secret access key. WARNING: Do not store secrets in the config file.
secretAccessKey.markdownDescription: **`string`** ⚠️ S3 secret access key. Do not commit secrets — use environment variables.

hidden.description: Glob patterns to exclude from upload.
hidden.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Glob patterns for files to exclude from upload.

PublishConfig.markdownDescription:
**`PublishConfig`** S3-compatible storage upload configuration.

- `endpoint` **`string`** — storage endpoint URL
- `bucket` **`string`** — target bucket name
- `prefix` **`string`** — key prefix (e.g. `docs/v2/`)
- `region` **`string`** — storage region
- `accessKeyId` / `secretAccessKey` **`string`** ⚠️ credentials — use env vars
- `hidden` **`string[]`** — glob patterns to exclude from upload
PublishConfig.description: S3 publish config. Fields: endpoint, bucket, prefix, region, accessKeyId, secretAccessKey, hidden.

form.description: Custom bug report form URL or path.
form.markdownDescription: **`string`** Custom bug-report form URL or path.

YaBugConfig.markdownDescription:
**`YaBugConfig`** Bug-report widget (docs-viewer) configuration.

- `disabled` **`boolean`** — disable the widget globally
- `form` **`string`** — custom bug-report form URL or path
YaBugConfig.description: Bug-report widget config. Fields: disabled (boolean), form (string).

oneOf.description: Map of language codes to owner IDs. Use "default" key for fallback.
oneOf.markdownDescription: Map of language codes to owner IDs. Use "default" key for fallback.

ownerId.markdownDescription: **`string | object`** Pythia feedback survey owner ID. String for a single ID; object maps language codes to IDs.

hideHeader.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Hide the feedback widget header section.

disabled.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Disable the Yandex Feedback widget globally.

testIds.description: Test form IDs for A/B testing.
testIds.markdownDescription: **`object`** A/B test form IDs for the feedback widget.

YaFeedbackConfig.markdownDescription:
**`YaFeedbackConfig`** Yandex Feedback (Pythia) widget configuration.

- `ownerId` **`string | object`** — feedback owner ID or language → ID map
- `hideHeader` **`boolean`** — hide the widget header
- `disabled` **`boolean`** — disable the widget globally
- `testIds` **`{ownerId, hideHeader, disabled, testIds}`** — A/B test form IDs
YaFeedbackConfig.description: Yandex Feedback widget config. Fields: ownerId, hideHeader, disabled, testIds.

project-name.description: Project URL slug. Lowercase, alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores. Max 63 chars. Reserved names: build, docs-assets, api.
project-name.markdownDescription: **`string`** Project URL slug. Lowercase, alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores. Max 63 chars. Reserved names: build, docs-assets, api.

no-index.description: Disallow indexing by external search engines.
no-index.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Disallow indexing by external search engines.

langs.description: Languages shown in the docs UI; first is default.
langs.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Languages shown in the docs UI; first is default.

favicon-src.description: Favicon URL for the browser tab.
favicon-src.markdownDescription: **`string`** Favicon URL for the browser tab.

logo-options.description: Logo configuration for the docs viewer.
logo-options.markdownDescription: **`LogoOptions`** Logo configuration for the docs viewer.

gtm.description: Google Tag Manager settings for the viewer.
gtm.markdownDescription: **`{id, mode}`** Google Tag Manager settings for the viewer.

github-url-prefix.description: Base URL for GitHub source links.
github-url-prefix.markdownDescription: **`string`** Base URL for GitHub source links.

pdf.description: Enable the PDF download button in the docs viewer.
pdf.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable the PDF download button in the docs viewer.

logo-src.description: Legacy logo URL for light theme (prefer logo-options.src).
logo-src.markdownDescription: **`string`** Legacy logo URL for light theme (prefer logo-options.src).

logo-dark-src.description: Legacy logo URL for dark theme (prefer logo-options.src-dark).
logo-dark-src.markdownDescription: **`string`** Legacy logo URL for dark theme (prefer logo-options.src-dark).

index-page.markdownDescription: **`{title, description, service-url, hidden}`** Index page configuration.

protected.description: Enable access protection for the project.
protected.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Enable access protection for the project.

url.description: Exact external URLs to exclude from crawler-manifest.json.
url.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Exact external URLs to exclude from crawler-manifest.json.

regexp.description: Regular expression patterns (JS /pattern/flags syntax) matching external URLs to exclude from crawler-manifest.json.
regexp.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Regular expression patterns (JS /pattern/flags syntax) matching external URLs to exclude from crawler-manifest.json.

src.description: Logo image URL for light theme. Object form maps lang to URL.
src.markdownDescription: **`string`** Logo image URL for light theme. Object form maps lang to URL.

src-dark.description: Logo image URL for dark theme.
src-dark.markdownDescription: **`string`** Logo image URL for dark theme.

src-mobile.description: Logo image URL for light theme on mobile.
src-mobile.markdownDescription: **`string`** Logo image URL for light theme on mobile.

src-mobile-dark.description: Logo image URL for dark theme on mobile.
src-mobile-dark.markdownDescription: **`string`** Logo image URL for dark theme on mobile.

url.description: Link target when clicking the logo. Supports {lang} placeholder.
url.markdownDescription: **`string`** Link target when clicking the logo. Supports {lang} placeholder.

title.description: Fallback text when logo image is not set.
title.markdownDescription: **`string`** Fallback text when logo image is not set.

source.markdownDescription:
**`string | object`** Source language.

- String: ISO 639-1 code (`'en'`, `'ru'`)
- Object: `{language: 'en', locale?: 'US'}`

target.markdownDescription: **`string | string[]`** Target language(s) to translate to.

files.description: Explicit list of files/filter-lists to translate.
files.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Explicit list of files or filter-lists to translate.

include.description: Glob patterns or paths for files to include.
include.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Glob patterns or paths for files to include in translation.

exclude.description: Glob patterns or paths for files to exclude.
exclude.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Glob patterns or paths for files to exclude from translation.

vars.description: Variables passed directly to the translation pipeline.
vars.markdownDescription: **`object`** Variables passed to the translation pipeline (overrides presets).

dryRun.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Calculate translation quota without executing the translation.

useSource.description: Use original text as translation result (debug mode).
useSource.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Use the original source text as the translation output (debug mode).

schema.description: Paths to custom translate schema files.
schema.markdownDescription: **`string[]`** Paths to custom translate schema files.

filter.description: Only translate files resolved from toc.yaml.
filter.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Only translate files resolved from toc.yaml.

noRefResolve.description: Disable $ref resolving in OpenAPI during extract.
noRefResolve.markdownDescription: **`boolean`** Disable $ref resolving in OpenAPI during extract.

glossary.markdownDescription: **`string`** Path to a glossary YAML file (provider-specific).

auth.markdownDescription: **`string`** ⚠️ Authorization token for the translation API. Use environment variables instead of storing here.

TranslateConfig.markdownDescription:
**`TranslateConfig`** Configuration for the `translate` command.

- `provider` **`string`** — translation service identifier
- `source` **`string | object`** — source language (`'en'` or `{language, locale?}`)
- `target` **`string | string[]`** — target language(s)
- `files` **`string[]`** — explicit file list
- `include` / `exclude` **`string[]`** — glob filters
- `dryRun` **`boolean`** — calculate quota without translating
- `useSource` **`boolean`** — use original text as output (debug)
TranslateConfig.description: Translate command config. Fields: provider, source, target, files, include, exclude, vars, dryRun, useSource, and provider-specific fields.

AnalyticsConfig.description: Web analytics configuration (e.g. Google Tag Manager).
AnalyticsConfig.markdownDescription: **`{gtm, metrika}`** Web analytics configuration (e.g. Google Tag Manager).

markdownDescription:
Diplodoc build configuration file (`.yfm` or `.yfm.yaml`).
Controls the documentation build: input/output paths, language, output format, VCS integration, linting, search, extensions, and much more.
```yaml input: ./docs output: ./build lang: en outputFormat: html ```
